title: Casdon Fruit & Veg. Assorted Toy Basket with Fruits & Vegetables for Children Aged 2+. Perfect for Playing Shops
features: PERFECT FOR PLAYING SHOPS: Whether acting as customer or living life as a shopkeeper, an infinite amount of imaginative play awaits!
SELECT AND STACK: Stack your favourite pieces of fruit and vegetables into the colourful basket and carry away!
REALISTIC PLAY: Now your little ones can shop for groceries just like the grown-ups do!
INCLUDES: Colourful basket with a handle and a selection of 21 fruits and vegetables.
EASY TO CARRY: Weight (kg): 0.25, Length (cm): 21.5, Width (cm): 16.5, Height (cm): 10.0
description: Product Description While this set does not technically count as your five a day, it sure does look delicious! Whether playing as shopkeeper or pretending to be in the supermarket, your little one will enjoy endless amounts of fun with their new fruit and veg basket. This colourful mini basket comes equipped with all the healthy greens, featuring the classics like grapes and carrots, right through to more exotic produce like asparagus and sweetcorn. With 21 pieces of fruit and veg to explore, there will always be something new to try. Little Shoppers will absolutely love stacking their favourite bits of produce into the basket, feeling as though they are taking part in adult tasks. You can even combine the basket with other Little Shopper or Little Cook toys to enhance the amount of fun! Safety Warning Use under Adult Supervision
